1051677933.en_literal: This is... the lightning of the dark sky!

197432454.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
197432454.jp_real: 聖なる光よ、我が剣に祝福を！
197432454.english: Oh holy light, guide my blade with your blessing!

64153053.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
64153053.jp_real: 聖なる光と闇の理が交わる！すなわち、最強であります！
64153053.en_literal: The holy light and the darkness of refusal are intertwined. That is, the strongest!
64153053.english: Where holy light and blackest night converge, true strength may be found!

790710700.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
790710700.jp_real: 我らはどこまでも強くなれるであります！

764395517.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
764395517.jp_real: ラカム殿の後方支援のおかげでありましょう！
764395517.english: Your expert shooting thinned out their ranks!

468619159.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
468619159.en_literal: This is the light of justice!

818385149.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
818385149.jp_real: 輝やける正義の執行！とくと見よってあります！
818385149.en_literal: Let the shining execution of justice begin! I'll show you what I can do!
818385149.english: The light of justice shines so that all may see its virtue!

1018836457.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
1018836457.jp_real: 美しく、炸裂したであります！
1018836457.english: Wherever justice lives, their beauty thrives!

349857169.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
349857169.jp_real: ナスべき正義のため、自分もお供いたしましょう！
349857169.en_literal: For the sake of justice that must be done, let us become one!
349857169.english: In the name of justice, I shall be your judge!

1027383348.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
1027383348.jp_real: まさに突貫であります！
1027383348.en_literal: That's exactly what I'm talking about!
1027383348.english: Nerdu wells always set me off!

322038311.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
322038311.jp_real: 引き続き、デュミエールの剣の真髄をお見せしましょう！
322038311.en_literal: Let me show you the true power of Lumiel's sword!
322038311.english: The quintessence of Lumiel's sword arts has yet to reveal itself!

681513743.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
681513743.jp_real: おそれ多いであります！

77764448.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
77764448.jp_real: かのけいせいに認めていただけるとは、光栄であります！
77764448.en_literal: To be acknowledged by your esteemed swordsmanship is truly an honor!
77764448.english: I am honored to have my talent recognized by a legend!

810109593.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
810109593.jp_real: 重ね続けた努力は、決して裏切らないであります！
810109593.en_literal: Your persistent efforts will never betray you!

893103812.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
893103812.jp_real: ガンダゴウザ殿と共に、さらなる高みを目指すであります！
893103812.en_literal: Together with Ghandagoza, I aim to reach even greater heights!
893103812.english: We are kindred spirits, ceaseless in our quest for greatness!

705489927.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
705489927.jp_real: 完璧に決まったでありますな！

303712873.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
303712873.jp_real: そうでしょうそうでしょう

188982330.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
188982330.jp_real: 可愛さなど無用であります！フフッ！
188982330.en_literal: No need for such cuteness! Hah!
188982330.english: Adorable is the last impression I wish to impart!

1061753439.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
1061753439.jp_real: イド殿の頑張りよ、自分は知っているでありますよ！
1061753439.en_literal: I know how hard you're trying, Id!
1061753439.english: You know more than most, sir Id. Have faith. I've seen your efforts.

429178661.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
429178661.jp_real: これぞ我が奥義！てやります！
429178661.english: Our foes would do well not to forget that!

494424452.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
494424452.english: Yes! With the side of justice!

944430777.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
944430777.en_literal: If I was standing in the way of your vow, then I'm sorry.
944430777.english: Nah! My apologies for aggravating your vision!

261120033.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
261120033.english: The nerve! It's forever pure, forever righteous!

215268414.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
215268414.jp_real: 聖剣よ、我らが行く道を照らし、導きたまえ！
215268414.en_literal: Holy Ladder! Let us light the way forward!
215268414.english: Oh holy blade, light our path forward and guide us to victory!

358229150.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
358229150.jp_real: 我らが剣の奥義、見事炸裂したであります！
358229150.english: Our explosive fury cannot be contained!

294715390.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
294715390.jp_real: これは失敬！狙撃の妨げとならないようにするであります！
294715390.en_literal: This is a must-win! I'll make sure I don't become a hindrance to your sniping!
294715390.english: Forgive me! I must be more considerate to our gunman!

635888370.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
635888370.jp_real: あっ、ギリギリ届いたであります！
635888370.en_literal: Phew! Just barely made it in time!

624628492.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
624628492.jp_real: ディュミエール聖騎士団団長として威厳を示したまで！
624628492.en_literal: As the commander of the Lumiel Knights, I shall show you my true power!
624628492.english: As captain of the Lumiel Order, I must always be a paragon of excellence.

487262083.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_water_1
487262083.jp_real: ブルーデトンネーション！

721261773.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_water_2
721261773.jp_real: 無償のイルミネーター！

901978555.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_wind_1
901978555.jp_real: エアロデトネーション！

212658050.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_wind_2
212658050.jp_real: ランカイのテンペスト！

494058857.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_name_A_1
494058857.jp_real: ノーブル！エクスキューション！

164241089.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_name_A_2
164241089.jp_real: ナーブレーカースキッター！

933483905.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
933483905.en_literal: Now is the time for the sword's vow!

546227133.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
546227133.jp_real: この一振りに、鋼の決意を！ やああああ！
546227133.en_literal: For this one swing, steel's resolve!
546227133.english: In this noble sword burns true virtue!

373893375.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0000
373893375.english: I'll make quick work of this!

515371351.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0100
515371351.english: I'll make quick work of this!

1010545552.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1900
1010545552.jp_real: シャルロッテ：召致であります！

913015944.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL2100
913015944.jp_real: 終わらせるであります！
913015944.english: I will strike with all my fury!

530643896.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL2300
530643896.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!

237917467.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_la_B_PL1300
237917467.jp_real: スケダチスルデアリマス！

1048834334.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_la_B_PL1400
1048834334.jp_real: 自分に任せるであります！

636168365.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_la_C_3
636168365.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!

110787438.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_la_self_1
110787438.jp_real: 好きだらけであります！

756926931.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
756926931.jp_real: 聖晶獣、相手でも果敢に挑むであります！
756926931.en_literal: I'll face even a holy beast boldly!
756926931.english: We stand tall, even in the presence of a mighty primal!

1071597244.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
1071597244.jp_real: これ以上の朗読は許さないであります！
1071597244.en_literal: I won't forgive any more insults!
1071597244.english: To make a revel of violence! It's shameless!

548926120.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
548926120.jp_real: 邪魔をしないでもらいたいってありますね！
548926120.en_literal: I'd appreciate it if you'd stay out of my way!
548926120.english: This is your last chance to retreat, scoundrel!

724628621.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
724628621.jp_real: 赤い船を見失うわけにはいきません！
724628621.en_literal: I can't afford to lose sight of the red ship!
724628621.english: We mustn't allow the red ship to escape!

183497234.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
183497234.jp_real: 優れた武人とお見受けしますが、容赦はできません！
183497234.en_literal: I see you're a fine warrior, but I can't let you pass!
183497234.english: I cannot afford mercy against this varlet!

173594032.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
173594032.jp_real: 静勝獣を鎮め、早く後を追わねば！
173594032.en_literal: I'll calm the holy arrow and quickly finish the rest!
173594032.english: Lie down, wolf! We don't have time to play!

390100378.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
390100378.jp_real: 巨大だからなんだというのです！
390100378.en_literal: It's huge, so what are you gonna do about it!
390100378.english: Your size fails to impress me!

59964014.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
59964014.jp_real: あの実のこなし、ただものではないようですね！
59964014.en_literal: That little brat... doesn't seem like someone to be taken lightly.
59964014.english: They boast impressive speed! Stay on guard!

322773022.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
322773022.jp_real: 我が聖剣撃！受けきれるものか！
322773022.en_literal: My holy sword technique—nothing can withstand it!
322773022.english: This holy sword is my strength!

263851010.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
263851010.jp_real: 剣の数などに惑わされたりはしません！
263851010.en_literal: I won't be fooled by the number of swords!
263851010.english: Your flimsy arsenal won't save you, sorceress!

236362541.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
236362541.jp_real: 手応えあり！ってやりますよ！
236362541.en_literal: You're in for a treat! I'll show you what I've got!

165128201.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
165128201.jp_real: 同じハービン族とて、容赦しないでありますよ！
165128201.en_literal: I won't lose to the same Harpy race!
165128201.english: Fellow Harvin or no, you'll garner no sympathy from me!

332019712.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
332019712.jp_real: 必ず突破口があるはずであります！
332019712.en_literal: There must be a way to break through!
332019712.english: There has to be a way to cut it down to size!

487422465.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
487422465.jp_real: さながら、小倍にでもなったかのような気分と言いますか！
487422465.en_literal: I feel like I've become a little too cowardly, I suppose.
487422465.english: I shall think twice before swatting flies! Now that I know how they feel!

917825386.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
917825386.jp_real: 勝利は掴むもの！手を伸ばし続ければ、いずれは！
917825386.en_literal: Victory is for those who seize it. Keep reaching out, and you'll eventually...
917825386.english: Do not give up, friends! Where there's a will, there's a way!

987531958.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
987531958.jp_real: 巨大だからなんだというのです！
987531958.en_literal: Because it's huge! What's the problem with that!?
987531958.english: I said your size fails to impress me!

194928389.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
194928389.jp_real: 最後まで警戒をおこたらぬよ！
194928389.en_literal: I won't let my guard down until the very end!
194928389.english: Stay vigilant! This battle is not won yet!

853743269.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
853743269.jp_real: デュミエルの剣、ここにあり！
853743269.en_literal: The sword of Lumiel! Here it is!
853743269.english: Sword of Lumiel, show us the light!

334773984.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
334773984.jp_real: さあ、観念するであります！

543888069.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
543888069.jp_real: シャーブは見えました！お覚悟を！
543888069.en_literal: I see the opening! Get ready!

1016088802.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
1016088802.jp_real: 今は時間が惜しいであります！
1016088802.english: We did not come here to play!

604371640.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
604371640.jp_real: なんとか攻略し、地下を目指さねば！
604371640.en_literal: I have to take it down and head for the basement!
604371640.english: Our target lies underground! Not here!

123573741.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
123573741.jp_real: このようなからくりなどには
123573741.en_literal: I don't serve puppets like you!

1056451656.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
1056451656.jp_real: このような不浄な兵器、破壊しておくべきでありますね！
1056451656.en_literal: Such a ridiculous weapon... it must be destroyed!
1056451656.english: Such menacing weapons must be dismantled!

84404304.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
84404304.jp_real: そちらも引くわけにはいかないようでありますね。
84404304.en_literal: Looks like we can't back down now, can we?
84404304.english: Only one side shall emerge triumphant!

352464477.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
352464477.jp_real: 我らの連携、いかがでありますか？
352464477.en_literal: How do you like our teamwork?
352464477.english: When it comes to camaraderie, we have you beat!

277419986.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
277419986.jp_real: 綺麗な…一体なぜそこまでリリスに
277419986.en_literal: That's amazing... why did you go that far for Lilith?
277419986.english: Can't you see that Lilith treats you as her pawns?

131979781.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
131979781.jp_real: さあ、ここで決着をつけましょう！
131979781.en_literal: Then, let's settle this right here!
131979781.english: Teaming up against us will not alter the outcome!

614913059.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
614913059.jp_real: ことここに至り、またも膝をつくわけにはいきません！
614913059.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this! I won't kneel down again!
614913059.english: We have come too far to suffer another shameful defeat!

796931475.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
796931475.jp_real: 聖なる剣にて、悪を討つ！
796931475.en_literal: Strike down evil with a sword of purity!
796931475.english: This holy sword of viscera eats evil!

400544044.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
400544044.jp_real: 奇連とは決着をつけなければなりませんね
400544044.en_literal: I must settle this with you once and for all!
400544044.english: Today shall conclude this nonsensical rivalry!

594645665.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
594645665.jp_real: 我が剣は届いています！
594645665.english: If words can't reach you, my sword will!

298813682.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
298813682.jp_real: いざ！決着をつけるであります！

105926287.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
105926287.english: You brought this punishment upon yourself!

944375214.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
944375214.jp_real: 異形の力、いかなるものぞ！
944375214.en_literal: The power of the stars... I'll show you!
944375214.english: Never have I encountered a more sinister power!

867817649.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
867817649.jp_real: 好きならば、最大級の攻撃よ！
867817649.en_literal: If you're ready, I'll unleash my strongest attack!

510317299.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
510317299.jp_real: 一切油断はできない相手であります！
510317299.en_literal: I can't afford to be careless against this opponent.
510317299.english: Careful! One mistake means certain death!

680692501.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
680692501.jp_real: 一度戦った相手だからと、おごりはしません！
680692501.en_literal: I won't get cocky just because I've fought you before!
680692501.english: Don't let our previous victory cloud your judgment!

383633712.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
383633712.en_literal: Let their power flow through me!
383633712.english: You would be wise not to underestimate us!

737603962.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
737603962.jp_real: まだです！油断なさらぬよ！
737603962.en_literal: Not yet! Don't let your guard down!

374535872.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
374535872.jp_real: エヘヘーイ！負けるものか！

30439641.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
30439641.jp_real: アスキ風ごと、払ってみせましょ！
30439641.en_literal: I'll show you what I can do with my favorite wind technique!
30439641.english: Purge the evil from these scales!

713377436.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
713377436.jp_real: 聖騎士の矜持にかけて！
713377436.english: By the honor of the holy knights!

741302211.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
741302211.jp_real: きゅ、急に冷えてきたであります！

584394271.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
584394271.jp_real: この勢いに乗じて、倒しきるでありますよ！
584394271.en_literal: I'll take advantage of this momentum and finish you off!
584394271.english: Keep this up and we shall win in no time!

872322825.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
872322825.jp_real: みんなの技の数々、冴え渡っているでありますな！
872322825.en_literal: So many of your moves have reached me!
872322825.english: Heed me! Victory is ours for the taking!

474057187.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
474057187.jp_real: やつの形態に合わせて対処していきましょ！
474057187.en_literal: Let's adapt our approach to match their movements!
474057187.english: Pay attention to the wolf's form and fight accordingly!

993648549.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
993648549.jp_real: ガランツァ殿に続きましょ！

308816027.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
308816027.jp_real: マギラフリラ殿と共闘することになるとは
308816027.en_literal: I never thought I'd have to fight alongside someone like you.
308816027.english: You have my undying gratitude, sorceress!

392551483.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
392551483.jp_real: ドロドロに落ちないよう注意せねば
392551483.en_literal: I have to be careful not to fall into the mire.
392551483.english: Whatever you do, do not step into the magma!

820453938.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
820453938.jp_real: 何度でも沈めてみせましょう！
820453938.en_literal: I'll sink you down again and again!
820453938.english: I'll slice you up as many times as you like!

761740166.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
761740166.jp_real: こやつを倒し、塔の頂上へと向かいましょう！
761740166.en_literal: Let's defeat that guy and head to the top of the tower!
761740166.english: Let's vanquish this foe and head for the top!

56036925.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
56036925.jp_real: 自分の持てる全てを、この一閃に！
56036925.en_literal: I'll give it my all... in this instant!
56036925.english: I shall put everything into this battle!

1059923582.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
1059923582.jp_real: ここで食い止めずして、何が戦騎士か！
1059923582.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this! What kind of knight are you?!
1059923582.english: If I can't stop you here, I don't deserve to be a holy knight!

275940933.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
275940933.jp_real: 仲間も空も守ってみせるであります！
275940933.en_literal: I'll protect my friends and the sky!
275940933.english: For my comrades! For the skies! I fight for all!

567758862.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
567758862.jp_real: これ以上、好きにはさせないであります！
567758862.en_literal: I won't let you go any further!
567758862.english: Your arrogance has gone unchecked for far too long!

931945406.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
931945406.jp_real: ディリス！決着をつけましょう！
931945406.english: Only the wicked shall fall today, Lilith!

457034771.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
457034771.jp_real: 我が剣の輝き、横しまなる者を貫かん！
457034771.en_literal: By the brilliance of my sword, I will cut down all who stand in my way!
457034771.english: Sacred light of my sword! Pierce the heart of darkness!

973074793.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
973074793.jp_real: 今こそ、すべてを終わらせるとき！
973074793.en_literal: Now's the time to end it all!
973074793.english: There will be no tomorrow if we fall today!

1072378246.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
1072378246.jp_real: これが絆の力ですか！なんと素晴らしい！
1072378246.en_literal: So this is the power of bonds? How wonderful!
1072378246.english: Behold! The power of our ironclad bonds!

483287627.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
483287627.jp_real: イド殿！聞こえているのでありましょ！
483287627.en_literal: I'm here, Your Highness! Can you hear me?
483287627.english: Id, heed our call! We've come to your rescue!

935724365.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
935724365.jp_real: 破壊の龍の化身！相手にとって不足なし！
935724365.en_literal: The mark of the Destroyer Dragon—more than enough for the enemy!
935724365.english: The dragon of destruction lives up to its name!

763484330.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
763484330.jp_real: ここが最後の正念場であります！
763484330.english: We stand upon the precipice of great upheaval!

304233346.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
304233346.jp_real: なんと高貴し！しかし、あれらは…
304233346.english: Do your worst, godly dragon! We will never capitulate!

776188191.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
776188191.jp_real: 我が聖剣儀にて、災いを祓いましょう！
776188191.en_literal: Let us cleanse the calamity with my holy sword!
776188191.english: By my holy blade, I shall purify you!

476694716.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
476694716.jp_real: 決着がつくまで油断なさらぬよ！
476694716.en_literal: I won't let my guard down until this is settled!
476694716.english: Do not rest until our mission is through!

991544436.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
991544436.jp_real: 相手にとって不足なし！

98493434.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_B
98493434.english: We must gain the upper hand somehow!

894930347.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
894930347.jp_real: 逆境でこそ折れるわけには
894930347.en_literal: I won't break down just because it's a crisis!
894930347.english: We cannot afford to waver! And yet...

599470790.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
599470790.jp_real: この風、ただ事ではないであります。
599470790.en_literal: This wind... is no ordinary thing.
599470790.english: I dare say there is malice on the wind!

1027307948.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
1027307948.jp_real: いくらでもお相手してみせましょ！
1027307948.en_literal: I'll show you how many I can defeat!
1027307948.english: I will never back down from you louts!

662197288.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
662197288.jp_real: グランサイファーに何をするでありますか！
662197288.en_literal: Gran Siphon! What are you going to do!
662197288.english: How dare you scratch our beloved Grand Cypher!

892378825.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
892378825.english: I am a wall of justice!

590330719.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
590330719.jp_real: 強断命！もはや許しません！
590330719.en_literal: Judgment! I will not forgive you!
590330719.english: Of you knaves, you've gone too far!

720423056.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
720423056.jp_real: もうじゃどもの相手はこのシャルロッテが
720423056.en_literal: I'll be the one to deal with you, monsters!
720423056.english: My name is Charlotta, and I'm your worst nightmare!

741535947.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
741535947.jp_real: イストリアス殿のご命令ならば、お任せよ！
741535947.en_literal: If it's for the protection of Lady Historia, leave it to me!
741535947.english: Have no fear, Historia! I shall keep you safe!

978050629.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
978050629.jp_real: いざ！今は全身あるのみ！
978050629.en_literal: Now's the time! I'm all in!
978050629.english: Hark! Now is the time to charge forth!

442628475.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
442628475.jp_real: 触媒は伊豆子に無事見つかるといいのでありますが。
442628475.en_literal: I hope the catalyst is found safely.
442628475.english: I can only pray the catalyst is still in one piece!

755691859.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
755691859.jp_real: 一番槍ならば、おまかせあれ！
755691859.english: Allow me to serve as our spearhead!

191735630.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
191735630.jp_real: この空域での戦いにも慣れてきたでありますね
191735630.en_literal: I'm getting used to fighting in this airspace.
191735630.english: Combat in this skydome is no different than fighting at home!

590344263.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
590344263.jp_real: 一気に駆け抜けるでありますよ！

104487295.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
104487295.jp_real: 邪魔立てするのなら、押し通るまで！
104487295.en_literal: If you're going to stand in my way, I'll push you all the way to the ground!
104487295.english: Treat me as a pushover at your own risk!

225742511.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
225742511.english: Obvia shall pay for their transgressions!

890978129.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
890978129.jp_real: 聖なる巫女心の籠のもと、災いを撃ち払わん！
890978129.en_literal: With the pure heart of a maiden, I cast away misfortune!
890978129.english: I call forth divinity's blessing to expunge evil!

236704290.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
236704290.jp_real: 今はただ、前進あるのみです！
236704290.en_literal: Right now, I'm just going all out!
236704290.english: We must reach the summit! Nothing else matters!

721092993.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
721092993.jp_real: 総大将リリスとの決戦に備えましょう！
721092993.en_literal: Let's prepare for the decisive battle with the Liberator!
721092993.english: Consider this a warm-up before the showdown with Lilith!

49191172.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
49191172.jp_real: なんと禍々しい場所なのでありますか！
49191172.en_literal: What a dreadful place this is!
49191172.english: Let us scour this fiendish place!

28647289.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
28647289.jp_real: 我らの敵ではありません！

533956549.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
533956549.jp_real: 素晴らしき連携、見事でありますな！
533956549.english: Wonderful camaraderie! We're a sight to behold!

551453156.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
551453156.jp_real: 実に頼もしいであります！

375667430.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
375667430.jp_real: さすがは歴戦の騎空士でありますね！
375667430.en_literal: You're quite the veteran, aren't you?
375667430.english: Only veteran skyfarers could execute such a stratagem!

912864298.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
912864298.jp_real: なんと素晴らしい連携！

375319711.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
375319711.jp_real: 頼らせてもらうでありますよ！
375319711.en_literal: I'll let you rely on me!
375319711.english: We shall have to do that again!

709738497.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
709738497.jp_real: 今のはいい流れでありました！
709738497.english: We're a force to be reckoned with!

993593382.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
993593382.jp_real: 仲間の力あってこそってありますね！
993593382.en_literal: That's what having comrades' power on your side is all about!
993593382.english: Oh, my stalwart allies! You are amazing!

1012020806.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
1012020806.jp_real: みんな、気を引き締めるであります！

10814629.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
10814629.jp_real: 次も我らの力を合わせましょ！
10814629.english: I feel sorry for the next villains who cross our path!

61073742.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
61073742.jp_real: カッコよく決まりました！

667462594.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
667462594.jp_real: お役に立てたでありますか？

183543166.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
183543166.jp_real: 次も合わせるでありますよ！
183543166.en_literal: I'll sync up with you next!

407677372.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
407677372.english: Our combined strength can move mountains!

120013740.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
120013740.jp_real: よし！次に備えるであります！
120013740.en_literal: Alright! Next up is the Holy Ladder!

629890596.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
629890596.jp_real: まだまだいけるであります！
629890596.english: And yet I could fight hundreds more!

620247280.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_1
620247280.jp_real: あと、は自分におまかせいただきましょう！
620247280.en_literal: Then I'll leave the rest to myself!

93345647.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_2
93345647.jp_real: 言われるまでもありません！
93345647.en_literal: I don't need to be told!

304406433.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
304406433.jp_real: もちろんです！全力で参りましょう！
304406433.en_literal: Of course! Let's go with all our might!
304406433.english: I'll sneak with all of my might!

879189449.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
879189449.jp_real: これが星の旅の剣でありますか！
879189449.en_literal: So this is the sword of a star traveler?
879189449.english: So this is the might of the Astrals!

428115692.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0100
428115692.jp_real: 団長殿、お見事であります！
428115692.en_literal: Captain, that was quite a sight to see!

981536768.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
981536768.jp_real: お見事であります、カタリナ殿！
981536768.english: You are indeed a most worthy knight, noble Catalina!

91484001.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
91484001.jp_real: エンゴ、感謝するであります！
91484001.english: You cut a most valiant figure!

849461523.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
849461523.english: That was most honorably done, sir.

228231314.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
228231314.jp_real: ロゼッタ殿、助かったであります！
228231314.en_literal: Rosetta, thank you for saving me!

505592765.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
505592765.jp_real: 良い連撃でありました！
505592765.english: My sword and your whip sing as one!

284747202.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
284747202.en_literal: That strike just now was amazing!

125277926.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
125277926.jp_real: さすがはヴェイン殿であります！
125277926.en_literal: I knew it was you, Vane!
125277926.english: I expected no less from you, sir Vane!

788777283.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
788777283.jp_real: 卓越した剣技、お見事であります！
788777283.english: Never have I seen a more grand and puissant blade!

863269779.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
863269779.jp_real: 剣の道は奥が深いでありまっす！
863269779.en_literal: The path of the sword is too deep for many.
863269779.english: I have much to learn about the art of war.

2442641.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
2442641.jp_real: 惚れ惚れする剣技であります！
2442641.en_literal: I'm completely smitten with your swordplay!
2442641.english: Your swordplay garners my utmost admiration!

899815470.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
899815470.jp_real: さすが伝説の拳であります！
899815470.en_literal: As expected of the legendary fist!
899815470.english: You live up to the tales!

1065203555.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
1065203555.jp_real: ゼタ殿の援護に感謝であります！
1065203555.en_literal: Thank you for your support, Zeta!

303214868.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
303214868.jp_real: 今のはバシッと決まったであります！
303214868.english: Together we foiled their evil schemes!

53387011.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
53387011.jp_real: 今のは、良い連携でありました！
53387011.english: You are truly an admirable ally!

883681974.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
883681974.jp_real: 向かうところ敵なしであります！
883681974.en_literal: I'll take care of the enemies ahead!
883681974.english: None shall stand in our way!

903422346.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
903422346.jp_real: サンダルフォン殿、援護に感謝するであります！
903422346.en_literal: I am grateful for your support, Sandalphon!
903422346.english: Thank you for your support, Sandalphon!

779009979.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
779009979.jp_real: さすがはシエテ殿であります！お見事！
779009979.en_literal: As expected of you, Seofon! Wonderful!

48427544.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
48427544.jp_real: わずかなブレもない正確無比な射撃でありますね！
48427544.en_literal: A flawless shot with not a hint of error!
48427544.english: My word, your shots strike true! And deadly!

393686629.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
393686629.jp_real: まさに一騎当千の活躍でありますな！
393686629.en_literal: That was quite the one-shot, all-out performance!
393686629.english: You sir, fight with the might of a thousand knights!

633618704.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
633618704.jp_real: 支援に感謝するであります！
633618704.en_literal: I am grateful for your support!
633618704.english: I am ever in your debt, milady!

533858398.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
533858398.jp_real: ベアトリクスだな！追撃感謝であります！
533858398.en_literal: Beatrix, I'm so grateful for your pursuit!
533858398.english: Sterling job, charging in from the flank!

347166609.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
347166609.jp_real: 美しい蹴り技…自分にもできるでしょうか？
347166609.en_literal: Beautiful kicking technique... Could I do that too?
347166609.english: What beautiful kickery! If only I could do the same!

330204732.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
330204732.jp_real: うううん…フェディエル殿ほどの背丈があれば…
330204732.en_literal: If only I had Fediel's height...
330204732.english: Aww, if only I was blessed with your stature, Lady Fediel!

417898840.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B
417898840.jp_real: 見事な連携でありました！

435202290.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_3
435202290.jp_real: うまくいったであります！

726530020.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
726530020.jp_real: これが我らの力であります！
726530020.english: The tide of virtue shall wash away all wickedness!

1061485365.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0100
1061485365.jp_real: さあ、この調子で行くであります！
1061485365.en_literal: Alright! Let's go with this momentum!

772252301.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
772252301.jp_real: 我らが剣、阻むものなしであります！
772252301.en_literal: We are the sword! Nothing can stand in our way!
772252301.english: All evil flees before our blades!

330557538.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
330557538.jp_real: とても良い狙撃でありました！
330557538.en_literal: That was a very good shot!
330557538.english: True aim is the sign of a true heart!

25695549.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
25695549.jp_real: 綺麗な連携でありました！
25695549.english: Are we not a most formidable team?

820838642.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
820838642.jp_real: オイゲン殿の支援、心強いであります！
820838642.en_literal: Eugen, your support is truly encouraging!
820838642.english: My heart rejoices to have such a warrior at my back!

413207388.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
413207388.jp_real: 大人の淑女たちにはむかうとこうなるであります！
413207388.en_literal: That's what happens when you go up against adult ladies!
413207388.english: We know not the meaning of damsel in distress.

788058164.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
788058164.jp_real: みんなの魂の強さを感じたであります！
788058164.en_literal: I can feel the strength of everyone's soul!
788058164.english: You have, or rather, our noble spirits!

469679937.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
469679937.jp_real: うまくいったでありますね！
469679937.english: We did rather well. If I say so myself.

228947572.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
228947572.jp_real: エンテイのケン、見事であります！
228947572.en_literal: The Sword of Lumiel! It's magnificent!
228947572.english: Your royal blade shall pass into legend!

110133774.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
110133774.en_literal: This is the sword that slays dragons!

263373905.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
263373905.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ殿、お見事であります！
263373905.english: Your swordsmanship leaves nothing to be desired!

124018372.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
124018372.jp_real: 良い連携でありました！
124018372.english: Smashing teamwork! If I do say so myself!

414793553.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
414793553.jp_real: 何度見ても凄い威力であります！
414793553.en_literal: I've seen it many times, but it's still an amazing power!
414793553.english: See how our enemies tremble before you!

717396927.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
717396927.jp_real: 見事な連携でありました！

244840165.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
244840165.jp_real: ドラフ族の背中は本当に大きいでありましゅね！
244840165.en_literal: The back of the Drow people is really huge!
244840165.english: So broad, so tall! You are the picture of a mountain!

214420884.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
214420884.jp_real: へへへ～！決まったであります！

247395693.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
247395693.jp_real: 自分も負けられないであります！

787902280.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
787902280.jp_real: 聖なる五か後のアランクト！
787902280.english: I am honored to receive your divine aid!

931314802.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
931314802.jp_real: 全空最強の剣、学ばせていただきましょう！
931314802.en_literal: The strongest sword in the sky! Let me teach you!
931314802.english: I have much to learn from the greatest swordsman to wander these skies.

420983318.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
420983318.jp_real: あっ！いつのまにか連携が成立していたであります！
420983318.en_literal: Huh! Our link was established before I knew it!
420983318.english: When did you join me in the fray?

210629961.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
210629961.jp_real: 見上げるような身長、実に羨ましいであります！
210629961.en_literal: Your height is truly something to look up to. I'm so envious!
210629961.english: If only I had your stature... Oh, the heights I could have reached!

682681610.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
682681610.jp_real: 見事に決まったでありますな！

121817654.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
121817654.jp_real: 見事な連携でありました！
121817654.english: We make a great team, don't we!

1023424322.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
1023424322.jp_real: 針の穴をも通すとは、まさにこのことでありますね！
1023424322.en_literal: To pass through the eye of a needle, that's exactly what this is!
1023424322.english: Why, you could shoot through the eye of a needle if you so pleased!

837278211.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
837278211.jp_real: この調子で、どんどん攻めるであります！
837278211.english: The day is ours! Continue the assault!

962513717.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
962513717.jp_real: さすがは六龍。すさまじい力であります。
962513717.en_literal: As expected of the Six Dragons, your power is truly immense!
962513717.english: The six dragons fight with truly tremendous powers!

364725672.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
364725672.jp_real: 気を引き締めていくであります！
364725672.en_literal: I'm going to tighten my focus!
364725672.english: Keep your shields high and weapons drawn!

66652423.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
66652423.jp_real: 油断せず参りましょう！

170650679.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
170650679.jp_real: さあ、ここからでありますよ！
170650679.en_literal: Well then, let's get this show on the road!

63879937.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
63879937.jp_real: 大きな敵も何のそのであります！
63879937.en_literal: Even big enemies are no match for me!
63879937.english: Size is no measure of ability!

518496066.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
518496066.jp_real: 我が剣に勝利を誓うであります！
518496066.en_literal: I swear victory upon my sword!
518496066.english: I pledge victory upon this blade!

1055450886.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
1055450886.jp_real: おないだし同士、切磋琢磨するであります！
1055450886.en_literal: Let's have a proper duel, fellow seniors!
1055450886.english: My twin in years, let us walk the path of chivalry side by side!

965895888.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
965895888.jp_real: ラカム殿、やったであります！

987508376.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
987508376.jp_real: イオ殿、やったであります！

655531253.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
655531253.jp_real: 油断禁物でありますよ！
655531253.english: Do not let your attention wander!

428225591.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
428225591.jp_real: もっと強く、威厳ある姿を示さなければ！
428225591.en_literal: I must show a more powerful, dignified form.
428225591.english: I too must attain such high glory!

301130359.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
301130359.jp_real: みんな、心強いであります！
301130359.english: Oh, most loyal and courageous comrades!

485374060.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
485374060.jp_real: ヴェイン殿、後ほどその…
485374060.en_literal: Vain, I'll be counting on you later!
485374060.english: Sir Vane, later if you would be so kind.

428955073.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
428955073.en_literal: I carry the pride of a knight!

922758756.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
922758756.jp_real: 次の敵に備えるであります！
922758756.en_literal: I'll prepare for the next enemy!

479845421.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
479845421.jp_real: 変幻自在の剣、勉強になるであります！
479845421.en_literal: The sword of divine judgment! It's quite educational!
479845421.english: A blade of shifting form! There's good pointers to be had here!

877879219.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
877879219.jp_real: ナルメア殿の剣、実に鮮やかでありました！
877879219.english: A blade as fair and terrible as the sea!

974159831.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
974159831.jp_real: すでも侮れないであります！
974159831.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!
974159831.english: Masters of hand-to-hand combat are not to be trifled with!

949594855.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
949594855.jp_real: ゼタ殿はスラっとしてて羨ましいであります！
949594855.en_literal: Zeta-dono is so cool and I'm envious!
949594855.english: Oh, I envy your lithe figure and your immense strength!

749596564.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
749596564.jp_real: バザラガ殿のオウガマ、なんて大きい！
749596564.en_literal: Your majesty, what a huge head you have!
749596564.english: Even your scythe is possessed of fearsome proportion!

694456711.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
694456711.jp_real: チャンスは見逃さないでありますよ！
694456711.english: Seek the shortest path to victory!

930073004.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
930073004.jp_real: 気を引き締めていくでありますよ！
930073004.en_literal: I'll keep my focus and go!

1064818877.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
1064818877.jp_real: 最後に勝つのは、清き志であります！
1064818877.en_literal: The one who wins in the end is the one with the purest will!
1064818877.english: When all else falls, only the righteous remain!

525646823.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
525646823.jp_real: 自分も負けてはいられないのであります！
525646823.en_literal: I can't afford to lose either!
525646823.english: Oh, I must redouble my efforts, lest you outpace me!

409739046.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
409739046.jp_real: 秘象術が使えれば、自分も大きく見えるでしょうか？
409739046.en_literal: If I could use magic, would I look bigger too?
409739046.english: If I could use flight magic, do you think my peers would look me in the eye?

275179208.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
275179208.jp_real: ガランツァ殿は、どうしてそんなに大きいんでありますか？
275179208.en_literal: Gallanza-sama, why are you so big?
275179208.english: If I may ask, how did you achieve such a hulking physique?

228136394.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
228136394.jp_real: 自分も秘書術が使えれば
228136394.en_literal: If only I could use a healing spell too...
228136394.english: Why does she get to fly? I wish I could fly.

987139301.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
987139301.jp_real: 不屈の闘志が強さの秘訣でありますか！
987139301.en_literal: Is it that the strength of a humble pawn is the key to power?
987139301.english: Is there a secret to your indomitable will?

879634850.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
879634850.jp_real: イナズマの一撃！見事であります！
879634850.english: That blast made my hair stand on end!

749861873.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
749861873.jp_real: フランドールの力、さすがでありますな！
749861873.en_literal: Fraud's power is truly something else!
749861873.english: Why, Lady Frau, your strength is immense!

421769820.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
421769820.jp_real: さあ、遠慮は無用であります！
421769820.en_literal: Well then, no need to hold back!

705100018.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A
705100018.en_literal: What is it? What is it?

439303281.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
439303281.jp_real: おまかせあれ！ってやります！
439303281.en_literal: Leave it to me! I'll do it!
439303281.english: I shall expose their every flaw!

260311572.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
260311572.jp_real: グラン、ジータ、カタリナ、ラカム、イオ、オイゲン、ロゼッタ、フェリ、ランスロット、ヴェイン、パーシヴァル、ジークフリート、シャルロッテ、ヨダルラーハ、ナルメア、ガンダゴウザ、ゼタ、バザラガ、カリオストロ、イド、サンダルフォン、シエテ、ソーン、ガランツァ、マグリエル、ベアトリクス、ユーステス、フェディエル、ルリア

285258433.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
285258433.jp_real: ローランド殿もお見事であります！
285258433.english: You were quite good yourself, sir Rolan!

209839381.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
209839381.jp_real: 大きな敵も何のそのであります！
209839381.en_literal: Even big enemies are no match for me!
209839381.english: And score a zero for evil!

773035160.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
773035160.jp_real: カタリナ殿のおかげでありますや！
773035160.english: Thanks largely in part to my sister in arms!

516600591.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
516600591.jp_real: ラカム殿の射撃も素晴らしかったりあります！
516600591.english: Now steer us to triumph, most skilled of helmsmen!

763512161.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
763512161.jp_real: イオ殿の魔法も良かったでありますよ！
763512161.en_literal: Io's magic was pretty good too!
763512161.english: With magic like that, you're hardly in need of a hero.

646773085.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
646773085.jp_real: お安い御用であります！

1014128407.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
1014128407.jp_real: レーニはお呼びしません！
1014128407.en_literal: I won't let you get away with that!

943958360.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
943958360.jp_real: え、そ、それはもしかして大きさが近いという意味でありますか？
943958360.en_literal: Wait, does that mean they're similar in size?
943958360.english: Hah! Then he acknowledges my superior stature! Good boy!

27716536.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
27716536.jp_real: 水臭いことはいい子の味であります！
27716536.en_literal: I'm not interested in anything that stinks of water!
27716536.english: Come now, I hardly lifted a finger!

272203145.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
272203145.jp_real: まだ今のは序の口でありますや！
272203145.en_literal: That was just the tip of the iceberg!

467259877.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
467259877.jp_real: 任せっていただきましょう！
467259877.english: Charlotta Fenia is always prepared to perform bold and heroic rescues!

509994260.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
509994260.jp_real: 記憶、正しく、高潔に！がモットーであります！
509994260.en_literal: My motto is to be kind, righteous, and pure!
509994260.english: Righteousness runs through the blade, and purity sits upon the hilt!

322232730.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
322232730.jp_real: 日々の鍛錬の賜物であります！
322232730.en_literal: It's the reward for my daily training!
322232730.english: I soar on the wings of virtue!

606239877.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
606239877.jp_real: なんと大きな背中！うらやましい限り！
606239877.en_literal: What a magnificent back... I'm positively envious!
606239877.english: What strapping dorsal muscles! I am almost envious!

1068168953.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
1068168953.jp_real: 任せっていただきましょう！

323561131.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
323561131.jp_real: ごずめもおまかせあれってあります！
323561131.english: A knight never runs from the call of duty!

186894921.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
186894921.jp_real: ハービンだからこその大見得！とくとご覧あれ！
186894921.en_literal: Harbin, so you can experience it! Watch and learn!
186894921.english: Harvin's favor, large blades, you know.

67689022.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
67689022.jp_real: これじゃあ、デュミエル聖剣撃！
67689022.en_literal: This is it! Lumiel's Holy Ladder!
67689022.english: Of course! Holy knights are the very picture of sophistication!

944789739.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
944789739.jp_real: 天空最強の剣士にお褒めいただけるとは、光栄であります！
944789739.en_literal: To think I'd receive praise from the strongest swordsman in the sky... it's truly an honor!
944789739.english: It is an honor to receive such a remark, especially from the sky realm's strongest swordsman!

1017316535.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
1017316535.jp_real: ソーン殿の的確な援護があればこそ、であります！
1017316535.en_literal: With Thorn's accurate support, it's a given!
1017316535.english: Nay, it was your guidance which won us this day!

944048394.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
944048394.jp_real: なるほど。ガランツァ殿ほどの武人となれば、感じ取ってしまいますか。
944048394.en_literal: I see... If I become a warrior of Gallanza's caliber, I'll be able to sense it too?
944048394.english: Well, I shan't argue with the general of such martial prowess!

1067479409.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
1067479409.jp_real: 何の何の！前衛ならばお任せあれ！
1067479409.en_literal: Whatever it is, just leave it to me!
1067479409.english: Think nothing of it! A knight never shrinks from the front line!

966069533.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
966069533.jp_real: まさに不滅の一撃でありました！
966069533.en_literal: That was truly an invincible strike!

1023238326.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
1023238326.jp_real: ディュミエール政権義の神髄、とくとご照覧あれ！
1023238326.en_literal: The essence of Lumiel's swordsmanship! Please accept my humble advice!
1023238326.english: Such is the splendor of all who study Lumiel's holy blade!

561842098.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
561842098.jp_real: 頼りにしているでありますや！
561842098.english: I'm proud to fight beside you!

71706439.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
71706439.jp_real: 何の何の！ここからが本番かと！
71706439.en_literal: What's the matter? This is where the real show begins!
71706439.english: Haha! But we haven't even begun to fight!

449532293.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
449532293.jp_real: 日々の鍛錬こそが大事なのであります！
449532293.english: We constantly strive to outdo ourselves!

574005288.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
574005288.jp_real: ミズクサイコトハイッコナシデアリマス！
574005288.en_literal: I'm not one to get my hands dirty!
574005288.english: Now now, there's no need for such courtesy between friends.

187954691.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
187954691.en_literal: I'll show you what I can do!
187954691.english: I am rather famed for my intellect.

204157033.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
204157033.jp_real: その言葉、セキシミオリにツキルであります！
204157033.en_literal: That word is more than just a skill.
204157033.english: Never expect less than great from a holy knight!

36344352.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
36344352.jp_real: 精一杯頑張るであります！
36344352.english: Of course! Our hearts are pure and our cause just!

167072087.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
167072087.jp_real: 白兵戦はおまかせあれ！
167072087.english: I shan't budge even an inch to the enemy!

545710366.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
545710366.jp_real: 次も自分が支援するであります！
545710366.english: It matters not, for we shall beat them back!

870829447.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
870829447.english: You are most courteous, Sir Lancelot!

214592653.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
214592653.jp_real: もちろんですとも！聖騎士の真髄をお見せしましょう！
214592653.en_literal: Of course! Let me show you the true spirit of a knight!
214592653.english: But of course! A holy knight never tires marching along the path of righteousness!

1037255246.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
1037255246.jp_real: ジークフリート殿のこそ、噂にたがわぬ豪剣であります！
1037255246.en_literal: Siegfried, you truly live up to your reputation as a heroic swordsman!
1037255246.english: You are a prodigious knight yourself, Sir Siegfried!

513408042.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
513408042.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ殿の剣も、流石であります！
513408042.en_literal: Yodarha, your swordsmanship is truly impressive!
513408042.english: You are no jest yourself, sir Yodarha!

926751176.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
926751176.jp_real: ナルメア殿も惚れ惚れする立ちすじであります！
926751176.en_literal: Narmaya-sama, your fighting style is truly captivating!
926751176.english: Your blade is just as captivating!

824373001.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
824373001.jp_real: 自分の場合、人一倍努力が必要でしたので。
824373001.en_literal: In my case, I had to work twice as hard.
824373001.english: That is because I train twice as much as your average knight!

486919155.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
486919155.english: One must strive for ever greater heights!

216892443.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
216892443.jp_real: 我が聖剣技は岩をも断つってあります！
216892443.en_literal: My Holy Ladder will shatter even rocks!
216892443.english: My noble blade cuts even the hardest of stones!

306302430.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
306302430.jp_real: それはもしかや、自分のまねでありますか？
306302430.en_literal: Is that... a copy of myself?
306302430.english: You aren't mocking me, are you?

784605164.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
784605164.jp_real: 同じ騎空団の仲間として当然でありますよ！
784605164.en_literal: As fellow members of the same Skybound Art, it's only natural!
784605164.english: Lumiel was my mentor, and virtue my muse.

180342692.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
180342692.jp_real: トオトキミココロノママニ！
180342692.english: I only do what duty commands of me!

118420825.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
118420825.jp_real: シエテ殿の立ち回りのおかげであります！
118420825.english: Twas but a breeze providing support for you, Seofon!

834186097.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
834186097.jp_real: はい！全力でお答えするであります！
834186097.en_literal: Yes! I'll respond with all my might!
834186097.english: Right you are! Back into the fray!

849468197.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
849468197.jp_real: 次もしっかりと合わせるであります！
849468197.en_literal: I'll make sure to sync up with you next time too!
849468197.english: And I shall do the same to the next evildoers who cross us!

247933409.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
247933409.jp_real: これも日々の鍛錬の成果であります！
247933409.en_literal: This is the result of my daily training!
247933409.english: I see my years of unyielding training have borne fruit!

582093470.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
582093470.jp_real: コーペツに、てあります！

552941778.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
552941778.jp_real: 自分が皆の盾となりましょう！

170084376.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
170084376.jp_real: ならば、急ぎ終わらせましょ！
170084376.en_literal: Then let's hurry and finish this!
170084376.english: Then let us finish this post haste!

805829799.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_3
805829799.jp_real: わかりました！集中するであります！
805829799.english: My mind is a steel trap!

388907614.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
388907614.jp_real: ローラン殿！どこを見ているでありますか！
388907614.en_literal: Rolan, what are you looking at?
388907614.english: Sir Rolan, do not play dumb with me! You know I am down here!

498648879.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
498648879.jp_real: もっと頼ってくれていいでありますよ
498648879.en_literal: You can rely on me more, you know!
498648879.english: As she always has and always will!

691720389.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
691720389.jp_real: これがルミエールに伝わる聖剣さばきであります！
691720389.en_literal: This is the swordsmanship of Lumiel passed down through the ages!
691720389.english: But of course! It was honed to a fine point by generations of holy knights!

923312455.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
923312455.jp_real: これが、聖騎士の力であります！
923312455.en_literal: This is the power of the Holy Knight!
923312455.english: Stuff hardly conveys the awe-inspiring power of Lumiel!

689464114.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
689464114.jp_real: まほけんしを目指してみるでありますか？
689464114.en_literal: Hmph! Shall I aim for the title of "Magical Knight"?
689464114.english: A battle mage? Now there's an idea!

15747506.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
15747506.jp_real: えへへん！次も任せとるであります！
15747506.en_literal: Heh heh! I'll handle the next one!
15747506.english: An ant can lift five thousand times its body weight. Why not a mighty knight?

959506438.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
959506438.jp_real: はい、わかったであります！

673039437.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
673039437.jp_real: フェリ、お前たちの活躍もお見事でありました！
673039437.english: That pack of yours deserves the highest honors!

648174837.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
648174837.jp_real: グフフン、望むところであります！
648174837.english: I've unleashed but a fraction of my true power.

405823654.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
405823654.jp_real: パーシヴァル殿、遠慮は無用でありますよ！
405823654.english: Sir Percival, don't hold back on account of me!

220101990.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
220101990.jp_real: はい！綺麗に決まったであります！
220101990.english: I know that went rather well.

130425750.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
130425750.jp_real: 腕の見せどころでありますので！
130425750.english: I am rather proud of my speed.

705191610.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
705191610.jp_real: 今に満足せず、さらなる高みを目指すであります！
705191610.en_literal: I will not rest now, but aim for even greater heights!
705191610.english: Indeed. And yet, we must ever aspire to greater heights!

549884018.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
549884018.jp_real: 当然であります！気迫では自分も負けません！
549884018.en_literal: Of course! I won't lose to someone as weak as you!

184801901.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
184801901.jp_real: うふふ、頼ってくれていいでありますよ！
184801901.en_literal: Huh-huh! I'm glad you're counting on me!
184801901.english: Haha! Call on me whenever you wish!

42855177.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
42855177.jp_real: 我らの連携攻撃の前に敵なし！ってありますね！
42855177.en_literal: There's nothing that can stand against our cooperative attacks!
42855177.english: No one matches the fury of our combined might!

351824935.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
351824935.jp_real: え、え？美少女？ほ、ほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほ
351824935.en_literal: Huh... I'm not a little girl!
351824935.english: Gorgeous! I thought only mountainous models got called gorgeous!

336249518.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
336249518.jp_real: 自分は準備万全でありますや！

391042878.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
391042878.jp_real: 承知したであります！サンダルフォンドの！

77617582.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
77617582.jp_real: ん？どういうことでありますか？
77617582.english: Huh? Am I supposed to laugh?

164046786.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
164046786.jp_real: そして、キョクタダシクコウケツニってアリマス！
164046786.en_literal: And it says "wisely, correctly, and valiantly!"
164046786.english: Huh! Moto time! Forever pure, forever righteous!

787816540.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
787816540.jp_real: 自分も練習すれば、その術を使えるでしょうか？
787816540.en_literal: If I practice, can I use that technique too?
787816540.english: Alas, how much must one practice to perform such arts?

29660918.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
29660918.jp_real: ベアトリクス殿も目指してみるでありますか？
29660918.en_literal: Beatrix-dono, shall we aim for it together?
29660918.english: Do you wish to enlist? We are accepting recruits!

1032780138.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
1032780138.jp_real: はい！やるでありましょー！

328977211.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
328977211.jp_real: フラウドのあの力強さ、頼りになるであります！
328977211.en_literal: The strength of the cloud will surely be of help!
328977211.english: Nay, lady Fraux! It is you who makes battle a zephyr!

245530103.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
245530103.jp_real: 深淵の闇、その奥深くまで照らして見せましょう！
245530103.en_literal: I'll light up the deepest darkness for you!
245530103.english: Even unto the darkest abyss will my light shine!
